COMPLEX LITIGATION, DEPT. 613, OCT-28-2020 HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS HELD. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL WAGE AND HOUR CLAIMS AND DENIES DEFENDANT'S PETITION WITH RESPECT TO PLAINTIFF'S PAGA CLAIMS. THE COURT ALSO GRANTS DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A STAY. (SEE FORMAL ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG, CLERK: KEITH TOM, NOT REPORTED (613/AYSC)
